text: I feel a sense of anticipation as I approach the glass, its transparency both inviting and separating me from the vibrant, illuminated space inside. The indirect reflection of myself in the pane makes me wonder about boundaries—how often are divisions merely illusions or practical safeguards? There’s a quiet, almost clinical order to the space, yet something creative buzzes just beyond reach. My curiosity is piqued, tempered gently by the calm of this white, geometric environment.
